ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the crime data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime data was recorded */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "n_injured" INTEGER /* Number of injuries in the given year */,
  "n_killed" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the given year */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the city based on crime rate in the given year */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the crime resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_subtypes" (
  "crime_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime subtype */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type the subtype belongs to */,
  "crime_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime subtype */,
  "average_sentence" INTEGER /* Average sentence length in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_subtypes_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "crime_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime subtype the statistic belongs to */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the statistic belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "n_occurrences" INTEGER /* Number of occurrences of the crime subtype */,
  "n_injured" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the crime subtype */,
  "n_killed" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the crime subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_subtype_id") REFERENCES crime_subtypes ("crime_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the crime rate belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime rate was recorded */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate for the given city and year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the ranking belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was recorded */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the city based on crime rate */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate for the given city and year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the department headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
